commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Codex reset-credit list and consume support to OAuth usage, native menu and Providers settings UI, expiry notifications, localization strings, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: source inspection of current main and the PR head shows reset-credit helpers bypass selected-account context, optional-usage gating, and current API-key fallback behavior. I did not run live provider validation because this is a read-only review and AGENTS.md warns against live Keychain/provider probes unless explicitly requested.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the contributor must provide consume-flow proof and a maintainer must approve the account-affecting UX; the code defects are concrete, but proof and product blockers make this unsafe for a repair marker now.
